title: AT Directory Merchant
description: A merchant indexed by the Agentic Terminal Directory. One JSON file per merchant under data/merchants/<id>.json.

id.description: Stable slug-form identifier. Filename must match: data/merchants/<id>.json.

merchant_did.description: The merchant's DID. No slashes in the DID string — path segments are colon-separated. Default for AT-hosted: did:web:agenticterminal.ai:merchants:<id> (note colons, not slashes). Resolves to https://agenticterminal.ai/merchants/<id>/did.json (colons map to slashes only in the resolved URL). Null until the merchant's DID document is provisioned. Once populated, this is the credentialSubject.id used in MerchantTrustCredentials issued for this merchant.

merchant_vc_url.description: Stable URL where this merchant's current MerchantTrustCredential is served (JSON-LD). Convention: https://agenticterminal.ai/merchants/<id>/trust-credential.jsonld. Null until Tier 1 issuance goes live.

merchant_controlled_key_ref.description: Optional. Fragment identifier of a merchant-controlled key included in the merchant's AT-hosted DID document (e.g. '#merchant-key-1'). When present, enables holder-binding and Tier 4 A2A mutual verification for this merchant. Null for merchants using AT-hosted default only.

participant_type.description: Distinguishes the kind of participant posting this listing. Defaults to 'merchant' when absent.

is_challenge.description: When true, this open-call is a competitive challenge with a prize. Only meaningful when listing_type is 'open-call'.

challenge_prize.description: Free-form prize or bounty description. Any currency. E.g. '500k sats', '$500 USDT'. Null until filled.

challenge_who_can_apply.description: Who may apply to this challenge.

listing_type.description: Whether this listing is an offer of services (offer) or a request seeking providers (open-call). Defaults to 'offer' when absent.

price_display.description: Human-readable price or budget string shown on marketplace cards. Free-form — not parsed or enforced. Examples: '5000 sats / request', '0.01 BTC for 90 days', 'Negotiate per task'. Null = not specified.

contact_url.description: How parties connect off-platform to negotiate and settle. AT facilitates discovery only — no escrow, no routing, no custody. Null = stub / TBD.

posted_at.description: When this open-call was first posted. Null for legacy records or ongoing offers.

poster_name.description: Display name of the entity posting this open-call. Free-form. E.g. 'Observer Protocol', 'ArcadiaB', an X handle.

mcp_server.description: How to install or connect. Prefix: 'npm:' for local install, 'http:'/'https:' for remote MCP endpoint.

auth_note.description: Short, agent-readable description of how the merchant authenticates — credential type, where to obtain it, how to attach.

rest_api.description: Base URL of a parallel REST API surface for agents that prefer REST over MCP. A connection surface like mcp_server (not documentation).
